goal: Implement governed external information system connectors for the memory service.
global_constraints: Do not bypass memory privacy gates, safe corpus or audit.
Do not store connector credentials in contracts or repository files.
Queueing through a backend separate from the primary Django database is required from the first implementation stage.
Raw API responses are retained only in explicitly enabled short-lived quarantine.
Raw quarantine encryption is deferred to a later hardening stage.
This remediation slice must prevent unsafe raw writes, but does not implement encryption at rest.
External permissions are mapped to portal scope_tokens manually during each source implementation.
All connector jobs must be idempotent and replay-safe.
Runtime landing zone artifacts belong under data/memory/external_api/.
